name: Liu Ziyang
page_title: Liu Ziyang  [Zheng Bao] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: Liu Ziyang is mentioned in Lu Su’s [I]Sanguozhi[/I] biography as a friend of Lu Su’s who wrote a letter to him, requesting that he join Zheng Bao. It is possible that this Liu Ziyang and Liu Ye (Ziyang) are one and the same.

sections.short-biography: Attempted to recruit his friend Lu Su for his lord. Possibly Liu Ye (Ziyang).
sections.family:
Possibly Same Person As

Liu Ye
sections.historical: Liu Ziyang is mentioned in Lu Su’s [I]Sanguozhi[/I] biography as a friend of Lu Su’s who wrote a letter to him, requesting that he join Zheng Bao. It is possible that this Liu Ziyang and Liu Ye (Ziyang) are one and the same.

full_text:
Liu Ziyang
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Ziyang. Attempted to recruit his friend Lu Su for his lord. Possibly Liu Ye (Ziyang). Liu Ziyang was affiliated with Zheng Bao.

BiographyHistoric (Unverified)
Liu Ziyang is mentioned in Lu Su’s [I]Sanguozhi[/I] biography as a friend of Lu Su’s who wrote a letter to him, requesting that he join Zheng Bao. It is possible that this Liu Ziyang and Liu Ye (Ziyang) are one and the same.
